falsification_rule_text: Not supported if policy channels (PMR, EPL, economic-freedom, tax, institutional quality) jointly explain less than 50% of the US-EU15 GDP-per-capita gap after demographics + trade + human-capital controls, or if including IRL and LUX in the baseline reverses the sign on core policy coefficients (indicating the divergence is FDI-distortion-driven rather than policy-driven).
